instruction: Enable Night Light, set the color temperature to 3700, and create ~/Desktop/night_light_status.txt with exactly two lines: enabled=true and temperature=3700.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu Desktop Guide - Adjust the Night Light color temperature (https://help.ubuntu.com/lts/ubuntu-help/display-night-light.html.en)

parameters.command: gsettings set org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.color night-light-enabled false; gsettings set org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.color night-light-temperature uint32 4000; rm -f ~/Desktop/night_light_status.txt

result.command: en=$(gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.color night-light-enabled 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); tp_raw=$(gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.color night-light-temperature 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); tp=$(echo "$tp_raw" | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); expected=$(printf 'enabled=true\ntemperature=3700\n'); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/night_light_status.txt 2>/dev/null); file_ok='false'; [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] && file_ok='true'; echo "enabled=$en"; echo "temperature=$tp"; echo "file_ok=$file_ok"
